calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-21-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment as follows:

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Order and Judgment were signed after hearing.

Judge: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2023 Continued To Oct-04-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
